extraction_notes: Complete extraction from 147 pages including ALIASES POWER pages 125-129. Every PP-prefixed rail has exact PMU buck/LDO source from aliases pages. M3 SoC (U6000). SPMU=U7700, MPMU=U8100, SVR AON=U5700, 5V buck=UC260 (TPS62130).

rails.name: PPVBUS_USBC0
rails.description: USB-C VBUS port 0 — left rear USB-C main power input

rails.name: PPVBUS_USBC1
rails.description: USB-C VBUS port 1 — left front USB-C

rails.name: PPDCIN_USBC_AON
rails.description: Charger alias rail — DCIN from USB-C, feeds charger IC

rails.name: PPVBUS_USBC5
rails.description: MagSafe VBUS rail

rails.name: PPBUS_AON
rails.description: Main system power bus — feeds U5700 (SVR AON), UC260 (5V), load switches, backlight. PBUS aliases on page 125.

rails.name: PPVBAT_AON
rails.description: Battery voltage rail after charger resistance. Alias of PPVBAT_AON_CHGR_RES on page 125.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON
rails.description: 3.8V always-on master rail — input to SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100). PP3V8 VMAIN aliases on page 125.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN
rails.description: PP3V8_AON VDDMAIN distribution. Aliases on page 125: PP3V8_AON feeds multiple sub-rails.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_WLBT_1SNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to WiFi/BT Willamette module with current sense

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_SPKAMP_LEFT_1SNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to left speaker amplifier with current sense

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_SPKAMP_RIGHT_1SNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to right speaker amplifier with current sense

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_HDMI_1SNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to HDMI circuit with current sense

rails.name: PP3V8_MAME
rails.description: 3.8V awake-state rail for audio amplifiers and misc

rails.name: PP5V_S2
rails.description: 5V S2-state rail. Iout max=2.1A. F=1.25MHz. Startup 4.7-10.5ms. BOM options for Vout.

rails.name: PP5V_S2_HOLD
rails.description: 5V S2 distribution — feeds multiple subsystems via load sense resistors

rails.name: PP3V3_S2_LDO
rails.description: 3.3V S2 LDO rail from MPMU

rails.name: PP3V_S2_LDO
rails.description: 3.0V S2 rail — NOT USED (LDO 5 listed as unused on page 43)

rails.name: PP3V_AON
rails.description: 3.0V always-on rail. Note: On A2918, LDO5 assignments differ from A2681.

rails.name: PP1V8_S2SW
rails.description: 1.8V switched S2 rail — VDD1 1V8 SWITCH. Turnoff typ 1.5ms.

rails.name: PP3V3_S2_HOLD_IPD
rails.description: 3.3V switched for IPD peripherals

rails.name: PP5V_S2_HOLD_ALSCAM_1SNS
rails.description: 5V switched for ALS/camera with current sense

rails.name: PPBUS_AON_BKLT_1SNS
rails.description: Switched PPBUS for display backlight with current sense

rails.name: PP3V29_BCKN_MAME2W
rails.description: Backlight 3.29V feed

rails.name: PPVDD_MAME_PCPU
rails.description: SoC Performance CPU core power

rails.name: PPVDD_MAME_GPU
rails.description: SoC GPU core power

rails.name: PP0V5_S1_SOC
rails.description: SoC 0.5V S1-state rail

rails.name: PP1V21_S2
rails.description: 1.21V S2-state rail — SoC VDD10/VDD_LOW domains

rails.name: PP1V8_MAME
rails.description: 1.8V awake-state rail. Alias PP1V8_S2 in some contexts.

rails.name: PP1V85_S2M_VDDQ5
rails.description: Memory VDDQ5 power

rails.description: SoC SRAM power — dynamic voltage scaling

rails.description: 1.25V S2 rail — USB-C controllers, I2C pull-ups, level shifters. Multiple distribution aliases on page 126.

rails.description: SoC 3D domain and SPI ROM power
